text: I feel a curious tension here, poised between the quiet, clinical stillness of a glass-walled meeting room and the vibrant energy of a creative R+D display. The juxtaposition awakens in me a sense of potential—the promise of ideas yet to emerge, the anticipation of spirited discussions, and the silent hum of innovation. It’s as though I am standing at the threshold of thought and action, observing the very architecture of human progress.
